subject: Re: WarpTools create_settings --folder_data problem
body:
Hey! In your processing directory there should be a logs folder, check in there for logs which should tell you why things have failed
Cheers,
Alister
Sent from mobile - apologies for brevity
On Mar 17, 2025, at 23:53, yoko “yokomaz” maz <chenxiangru2333@gmail.com> wrote:
﻿
Hey there! 
I'm new to cryo-em and I'm now following the tutorial 

<Quick Start: Tilt Series
 
From the tutorial>, when I used 
"WarpTools create_settings --folder_data ./frames --folder_processing  --output warp_frameseries.settings --extension "*.tif" --angpix 3.3702 --exposure 2.35" 
to create a .settings file, and I continued with 
"WarpTools fs_motion_and_ctf --settings warp_frameseries.settings --out_averages"
 the programe was looking for data at warp_frameseries/*.tif. The error is 
Failed to process xx/xx/xx/DEF_TOMO2/warp_frameseries/TS_034_040_-40.0.tif, marked as unselected
As far as I understand, --folder_data is the location where we have *.tif and --folder_processing is the location where we store the result of the processing. Can anybody help me this? Thanks a lot!
The organization of my file system is:
xx/xx/xx/DEF_TOMO2/warp_frameseries.settings
xx/xx/xx/DEF_TOMO2/frames/*.tif
xx/xx/xx/DEF_TOMO2/metadata/mdocs_modified/*.mdoc
xx/xx/xx/DEF_TOMO2/warp_frameseries




--
